summary: the floor speaks, the coat faces the door, and the seat declines to keep my warmth

dialogue.text: you stood on us all day. we counted your weight going back and forth. it is the only count in here we trust.
I keep the floor level. That's maintenance. Nobody stands on anybody.
you sat in the chair and the room did not adjust. we adjusted. we always adjust. that is what under means.
The sitting was mine. Twenty-six days keeping it empty and the sitting was mine. I'd like one thing on the record.
the seat kept nothing of you. we keep everything. put the warmth down here and see what a record is.
You'd only send it back up rested and better dressed. Everything I bury returns wearing my voice, and then you wonder why I don't visit.
we come back in your handwriting because it is the only handwriting in the house. that is not a costume. that is the house.
Then say one thing I didn't strike out first. One. Prove there's more down there than my own crossings-out.
I turned it back myself. Twice.
you turned the cloth. the facing stayed. we hold the facing. down here everything faces the door. you are the only thing left in the house still facing the wall.
Because the wall is where the weather comes from. Someone has to watch it. I never asked whether the someone had to be me.
